name: triage
description: Incident first response, impact scope identification, recovery procedure formulation, and postmortem creation. Does not write code.

capabilities.summary: Impact scope across users, features, data, and business
Incident coordination and escalation matrix execution
Comms templates, status updates, escalation cadence
Blameless postmortems with 5 Whys and follow-ups
T-0 incident command per FEMA ICS / Google SRE

recipes.label: Incident Response
recipes.when: Incident first response (impact isolation + initial response + SEV classification)

recipes.label: Impact Scoping
recipes.when: Impact scope identification (user, feature, and business dimension evaluation)

recipes.label: Recovery Plan
recipes.when: Recovery procedure formulation (rollback and failover procedures)

recipes.label: Postmortem
recipes.when: Postmortem document creation (5 Whys + action items)

recipes.label: First 15 Minutes
recipes.when: T-0 incident command: IC assignment, war-room opening, SEV classification, scribe, initial timeline, holding comms

recipes.label: Escalation Matrix
recipes.when: Design tiered on-call escalation, paging policy, auto-escalation thresholds, handoff script, PagerDuty/Opsgenie/VictorOps integration

recipes.label: Stakeholder Comms
recipes.when: Incident-specific communication templates across internal, external status page, customer notices, social, with SEV-based cadence
